question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/TopicService.java -> Scope: Medium: Theft of unpaid staking rewards'] [Function: findById(EntityId id)] Can an unprivileged user exploit the TopicController's lack of response caching headers to cause intermediate proxies to cache responses containing pending_reward values, serving stale reward data to other users who then make incorrect reward claims based on the cached inflated values?
